match: mid-century modern ranch house with clerestory windows
desc: A restored mid-century modern with walls of glass, clerestory windows and a butterfly roofline. Terrazzo floors and a walled pool courtyard keep the desert-modern spirit intact.
An impeccably kept Victorian painted lady with ornate gingerbread trim, soaring bay windows and a striking multi-color facade. Period detail meets fully updated systems inside.
A classic brownstone on a tree-lined block with a tall stoop, original plaster moldings and marble mantels. Four stories of flexible living plus a landscaped garden out back.
A storybook Tudor revival with steep gables, original half-timbering and leaded glass windows. Grand principal rooms, a paneled library and gardens that bloom spring through fall.
A lovingly preserved Craftsman bungalow with a deep front porch, tapered columns and quarter-sawn oak built-ins. Warm, light-filled rooms open to a private garden and studio.
A weathered-shingle Cape steps from the water, with white trim, hydrangea borders and a sunny rear deck. Crisp coastal interiors and a bunk room made for summer guests.
A commanding Greek revival with double gallery porches, soaring columns and original heart-pine floors, shaded by live oaks draped in Spanish moss. History with every modern comfort.
An authentic pueblo-style adobe with hand-plastered walls, exposed vigas and kiva fireplaces. Portals and courtyards frame mountain views and glowing high-desert sunsets.
A grand Mediterranean villa with a barrel-tile roof, arched loggias and a fountain courtyard. Resort grounds with a pool, summer kitchen and lush tropical privacy hedges.
A limestone French chateau with a slate mansard roof, iron balconies and formal parterre gardens. Gallery halls, a paneled study and entertaining rooms of rare scale.

match: log cabin home with stone chimney
desc: A hand-hewn log home with a river-rock chimney, vaulted great room and wide porches overlooking meadow and timber. Built for four-season mountain living.
An iconic A-frame tucked into the evergreens, with a wall of glass at the gable, a wood stove and a loft bedroom under the rafters. Deck living in every season.
A cantilevered glass-and-steel residence floating over the hillside, with frameless walls of glass, floating stairs and terraces that dissolve into the treetops.
A sculptural board-formed concrete home with monumental volumes, skylit galleries and warm walnut interiors that soften the raw structure. A private, gallery-like retreat.
A black-stained timber house with a crisp gabled silhouette, white-oak interiors and triple-glazed windows framing the woods. Hygge, engineered to passive-house standards.
A crisp modern farmhouse with board-and-batten siding, a standing-seam metal roof and a wraparound porch. Shiplap, wide-plank oak and a showpiece kitchen inside.

match: desert modern house with rammed earth
desc: A low-slung desert contemporary of rammed earth and glass, oriented to mountain silhouettes and saguaro-studded grounds. Deep overhangs, a negative-edge pool and starlit patios.
An elevated beach house with panoramic decks, a breezy open great room and boardwalk access to the sand. Hurricane-rated build with room for the whole crew underneath.

match: tropical modern villa with infinity pool
desc: A tropical modern villa where sliding glass walls open to an infinity pool and palm-shaded lanais. Indoor-outdoor living with a summer kitchen and lush resort grounds.
A romantic Spanish colonial with white stucco walls, a red-tile roof and hand-painted tile stair risers. Wrought-iron balconies and a bougainvillea courtyard with fountain.
A stately Georgian manor in aged brick with symmetrical wings, a columned portico and boxwood parterres. Formal rooms, a clubby library and staff quarters over the garage.

match: Dutch colonial house with gambrel roof
desc: A classic Dutch colonial with its signature gambrel roof, flared eaves and sun-splashed breakfast porch. Period charm with a renovated kitchen and finished third floor.
A Prairie-style landmark with strong horizontal lines, art-glass windows and deep cantilevered eaves. Warm quarter-sawn oak and light-banded rooms that hug the landscape.

match: art deco house with curved white walls
desc: A streamline moderne jewel with curved white walls, glass block and porthole accents, restored to the studs. A tiled pool patio channels pure 1930s glamour.

match: storybook stone cottage covered in ivy
desc: A storybook stone cottage wrapped in ivy, with a swooping cedar roof, arched plank door and leaded casements. An English garden and studio complete the fairy tale.
A timber-and-stone alpine chalet with soaring glass gables, a great-room fireplace and ski-room with boot warmers. Steps to the lift, with hot tub terraces facing the peaks.
A lakefront retreat with a wall of water-facing windows, terraced lawn to a private dock and sunset deck. Boathouse, firepit and swim platform included.
A glass-tower residence with floor-to-ceiling views, a designer kitchen and hotel-grade amenities: pool deck, fitness club, concierge and private lounge floors.
A pre-war deco residence with sunken living room, herringbone floors and casement windows framing skyline views. Full-service building with doorman and roof garden.
A dramatic warehouse loft with 14-foot timber ceilings, exposed brick and factory windows that flood the space with light. Freight elevator, roof deck and gated parking.
A crowning penthouse with a wraparound landscaped terrace, glass walls on every exposure and a private elevator landing. Outdoor kitchen, spa and skyline in every direction.

match: modern townhouse row with colorful facades
desc: A light-filled modern townhome with a bold facade, open mid-level living and a rooftop deck with city views. Attached garage and lock-and-leave ease near everything.
A Federal-era rowhouse on a cobblestone block, with six-over-six windows, original mantels and a hidden garden patio. Centuries of character, tastefully modernized.
A warm two-story traditional on a quiet cul-de-sac with a brick-and-siding facade, vaulted foyer and fenced backyard with playset-ready lawn. Top-rated schools nearby.
A thoughtfully renovated split-level with a reimagined open main floor, new white-oak floors and a sunken family room with fireplace. Big corner lot with mature trees.
A sprawling single-story ranch under mature pecans, with a limestone facade, covered patio and room to roam. Open family spaces and a flex wing for guests or work.
A showpiece barndominium blending black metal and warm cedar, with a 30-foot great room, glass roll-up doors and a monster shop bay. Acreage living with modern polish.
An ingenious container home with stacked corten volumes, walls of glass and a cantilevered upper deck. Compact, sustainable and utterly distinctive.
A designer tiny cottage that lives large: vaulted ceiling, full chef's kitchenette, built-in storage everywhere and a pergola patio that doubles the living space.
A light-filled geodesic dome with a soaring central atrium, triangle skylights and wraparound decking. Efficient, storm-tough and one of a kind on its wooded acreage.
A fully off-grid earthship with south-facing greenhouse corridor, rainwater cisterns and thermal-mass walls that keep it comfortable year-round — no utility bills, ever.
An original Eichler with its glass-walled entry atrium, post-and-beam ceilings and radiant concrete floors. Restored with reverence, opening to a private pool garden.
A gated shingle-style estate behind privet hedges, with gambrel rooflines, a sprawling porch and gunite pool with pool house. Sun-washed interiors a mile from the ocean.
A breezy lowcountry cottage with stacked double porches, haint-blue ceilings and marsh sunsets. Shiplap interiors, a screened porch and golf-cart access to town.
A pastel conch cottage behind a white picket fence, with Bahama shutters, gingerbread trim and a plunge pool in the tropical courtyard. Barefoot island living, blocks from Duval.
A Pacific Northwest modern clad in cedar and glass beneath a butterfly roof, engineered to frame Sound and evergreen views. Warm minimalism with serious rain-country bones.
A mountain modern of glass, steel and moss-rock anchored into the hillside, with a two-story window wall facing the peaks. Ski storage, rec room and sunset-catching decks.
A gated vineyard estate among the vines, with a stone-and-timber main residence, tasting cave and guest barn. Loggia dining overlooking rows that glow at dusk.
A turnkey equestrian estate with a center-aisle barn, irrigated paddocks and a riding arena, anchored by a graceful farmhouse with sunset porches.

match: Vermont farm homestead with red barn
desc: A picture-book farm homestead with a restored farmhouse, iconic red barn and sugar maples lining the drive. Fenced pasture, pond and a four-season mudroom.
A true ski-in/ski-out timber lodge with a stone hearth, bunk wing and slope-side hot tub. Watch the groomers from the great room, then glide out the back door.
A grand timber lodge above a sapphire cove, with lodgepole trusses, a boulder fireplace and lake-view decks on both levels. Buoy, pier rights and pine-scented mornings.

match: modern floating home on the water
desc: A light-filled modern floating home with rooftop deck, wraparound water views and kayaks off the swim step. City skyline by night, otters by morning.
A soaring mill conversion with 16-foot ceilings, granite sills and enormous arched windows over the river. Original maple floors and a private mezzanine study.

match: boutique mid-rise condo building with rooftop
desc: A boutique residence in an intimate mid-rise, with a chef-caliber kitchen, gallery walls and a residents-only rooftop lounge with skyline firepits.
A gracious Beaux-Arts residence behind a carved limestone facade, with 10-foot ceilings, herringbone oak and a windowed eat-in kitchen. White-glove staff and private storage.
A crisp minimalist duplex residence with a private yard, light-washed interiors and a flexible loft. Lock-and-leave modern living with income potential next door.
A romantic 1920s courtyard bungalow with arched doorways, a tiled fountain patio and bougainvillea spilling over white stucco walls. A storybook hideaway in the city.
A whimsical storybook cottage with a swooping hand-shaped roof, rolled eaves and a rounded door under a fairy-tale turret. Cotswold charm on a rose-lined lane.
A dramatic Gothic revival with steep cross-gables, lacy vergeboard trim and pointed-arch windows. Restored inside with modern comforts and moody period grandeur.
A distinguished Federal townhouse with a fanlight entry, gaslight-era charm and six fireplaces. Curved stair, garden terrace and a coveted historic-district address.
A grand Queen Anne crowned by a three-story turret, with a sweeping wraparound porch, stained glass and carved oak staircase. A masterpiece of Victorian craftsmanship.
A striking narrow-lot modern that lives far bigger than its footprint: triple-height light well, floating stairs and a roof terrace with skyline views.
A resort-style residence with a curved balcony over the water, marble baths and sunrise-to-sunset light. Pools, spa, tennis and valet at your service downstairs.
A palm-lined gated estate of monumental scale: gallery entry, glass-walled great rooms, a 90-foot pool and a subterranean auto gallery. Absolute privacy behind mature hedges.
A serene Japanese-inspired home organized around a moss-and-maple courtyard, with shoji-screened rooms, a soaking tub and an engawa porch for tea at dawn.

match: solar eco home with green roof
desc: A certified net-zero home with a living green roof, triple-pane glass and a solar array that pays the bills. Healthy-materials build with EV charging and battery backup.

match: modern courtyard house with pool Austin
desc: A limestone-and-steel modern wrapped around a private pool courtyard, with glass galleries connecting the wings and a live-oak shaded entry. Resort living, city address.
A cliff-hugging contemporary with glass rails and endless Pacific horizon, terraced to the bluff with spa, firepit and a stair to the sand. Whitewater views from every room.

match: gabled lake cottage with screened porch
desc: A gabled lake cottage with a big screened porch, knotty-pine great room and a firefly-lit lawn rolling to the shore. Shared pier, sandy frontage and s'more-ready evenings.
A breezy island Victorian with a wraparound veranda built for rocking chairs and harbor watching. Gingerbread details, sunrise bay windows and ferry-close convenience.

match: contemporary prairie home with stone and stucco
desc: A contemporary prairie home in stone and stucco with low-pitched rooflines, walls of west-facing glass and a covered outdoor room built for big-sky sunsets.
A one-of-a-kind firehouse conversion with the brass pole still in place, glazed-brick walls, arched engine-bay doors and a hose-tower stair to a roof deck.
A high-desert modern on open acreage with rusted-steel accents, a stargazing deck and walls of glass aimed at boulder-strewn horizons. Dark skies, bright design.
A stately limestone greystone two-flat on a boulevard block, with carved stone details, oak trim and updated mechanicals. Live up top, let the garden unit pay the mortgage.
